pymetis
  • API Reference
  • engine.dataitems
  • View page source

engine.dataitems

Base classes for pipeline data items (inputs and products).

class pymetis.engine.dataitems.dataitem.DataItem[source]

Bases: ParametrizableItem

The DataItem class encapsulates a single data item: the smallest standalone unit of detector data or a product of a recipe.

Class properties should describe the data item as defined in the DRLD (or conversely, we should be at least in theory able to regenerate the DRLD items from code).

Multiple files with the same tag should correspond to multiple instances of the same DataItem class.

final classmethod schema()[source]
Return type:

dict[str, Union[None, type[Image], type[Table], type[ImageList]]]

classmethod title()[source]

Return a human-readable title of this data item, e.g. “2RG linearity raw”

Return type:

str

final classmethod frame_group()[source]

Return the group of this data item.

This function should not be overridden.

final classmethod frame_level()[source]

Return the level of this data item.

This function should not be overridden.

final classmethod frame_type()[source]

Return the type of this data item.

This function should not be overridden.

classmethod oca_keywords()[source]

Return the OCA keywords of this data item.

By default, it’s just the value of the protected attribute, but feel free to override if necessary.

property hdus
__init__(primary_header=cpl.core.PropertyList, *hdus, filename=None)[source]
Parameters:

  • primary_header (cpl.core.PropertyList)

  • hdus (Hdu)

  • filename (Path | None)

classmethod load(frame)[source]

Construct the data item from a frame object.

Loads all the headers and makes them available via their EXTNAME. Does not load the actual pixel data / table. For that, see load_data.

Return type:

Self

Parameters:

frame (cpl.ui.Frame)

load_data(extension)[source]

Load the associated data (image or a table).

This might be an expensive operation and therefore the call is better deferred until actually needed.

Parameters:

extension (int | str) – The extensions, either an integer index or a string EXTNAME.

Returns:

The associated data (or None if the extension does not contain any, should only happen for the primary one)

Return type:

Image | Table | None

Raises:

KeyError – If the requested extension is not available

property used: bool

Return whether this data item is actually used in the product.

use()[source]

Mark this data item as actually used. Return itself, in order to enable method chaining.

Return type:

Self

add_properties()[source]

Hook for adding custom properties.

Currently only adds/replaces ESO PRO CATG to/in every product, but derived classes are more than welcome to add their own stuff. Do not forget to call super().add_properties() then.

Return type:

None

as_frame(filename=None)[source]

Create a CPL Frame from this DataItem

Param:

filename If not None, override the default file name with this

Return type:

Frame

Parameters:

filename (str | None)

save(recipe, parameters, *, output_file_name=None)[source]

Save the data item. Implementation depends on the type of the data. The body of this method is always called and saves the primary header.

Param:

recipe The pipeline recipe to assign.

Param:

parameters Extra parameters passed to the pipeline recipe.

Param:

output_file_name If not None, override the default file name with this.

Return type:

None

Parameters:

  • recipe (PipelineRecipeImpl)

  • parameters (ParameterList)

  • output_file_name (Optional[str])

save_extensions(filename)[source]

Save extension data to the same file. Implementation depends on the type of the data.

Return type:

None

Parameters:

filename (str)

as_dict()[source]
Return type:

dict[str, str]

classmethod input_for_recipes()[source]

List all PipelineRecipe classes that use this Input. Warning: heavy introspection. Useful for reconstruction of DRLD input/product cards.

Return type:

Generator[‘PipelineRecipe’, None, None]

classmethod product_of_recipes()[source]

List all PipelineRecipe classes that output this as a product. Warning: heavy introspection. Useful for reconstruction of DRLD input/product cards.

Return type:

Generator[‘PipelineRecipe’, None, None]

final classmethod extended_description_line(name=None)[source]

Generate a description line for pyesorex --man-page.

Includes leading space.

Return type:

str

Parameters:

name (str)

get_name(index)[source]
Return type:

str

Parameters:

index (int)

class pymetis.engine.dataitems.image.ImageDataItem[source]

Bases: DataItem

A data item with image data, possibly saved in multiple HDUs

class pymetis.engine.dataitems.table.TableDataItem[source]

Bases: DataItem

class pymetis.engine.dataitems.hdu.Hdu[source]

Bases: object

A loose association of a header and data.

__init__(header, data, *, name=None, klass=None, extno=0)[source]
Parameters:

  • header (CplPropertyList)

  • data (CplImage | CplTable) – Data inside this HDU. Might be empty.

  • extno (Optional[int]) – Can be used to access data by index.

  • name (Optional[str])

  • klass (Optional[type[CplImage | CplTable | CplImageList]])

save(filename)[source]
class pymetis.engine.dataitems.productset.PipelineProductSet[source]

Bases: ParametrizableContainer

A set of recipe implementation products.

class Meta[source]

Bases: object
